free_text: Research of prompt neutrons from 252Cf spontaneous
Gd-loaded liquid scintillator (60 cm in diam.)
Au-Si detectors to detect fission fragments.
Corrections for hall background neutrons and scission
Even-odd effect in the nu-A distribution has not yet
been observed, because mass resolution is not good
